task.title: "Doing Laundry"
task.shortdesc: "A short guide on how to do laundry."

step.note: "A good rule of thumb is keep whites and colors separate and to keep delicates separate from other clothes"

step.cmd: "Add detergent and laundry to the washing machine."
step.note: Keep all detergent, pods, or other chemicals out of reach of children and animals."
"Where protective gloves when handling bleach and handle with care to avoid spills or injuries."
"If you will be hanging your laundry to dry, consider adding some fabric softener to keep your close soft after drying."

step.cmd: "Select settings based on load and start laundry machine."
"Once laundry is done washing, transfer to dryer and start it or hang up to dry."
"Once clothes are dry, gather and do one of the following:"

ul.li: "Place on hangers and hang up in the closet"
